data.text: THE *THIRD* PLANET OF IT'S TYPE IN THIS SOLAR SYSTEM!
LOOKS A LOT LIKE 1/3 AND 4, ONLY THIS ONE DOESN'T HAVE THE PURPLISH
HOWEVER, THIS ONE TOO HAS THE POLAR LIGHTS.
THE FACT THAT THIS ONE DOESN'T HAVE DISCOLORATION
AT THEM, MAKES ME BELIEVE THAT THIS IS A ENTIRE NEW
NOTE: I WILL PROBABLY TAKE A CLOSER LOOK AT THIS PLANET SOON.
